title: Greenify Faithful 64x
description: Re-textures everything dyed green in the pack Faithful 64x to look better!
body:
**

Optional [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone), Optional [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) & Required [Faithful 64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x)** ‎ ![Title/Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21d61c67e1c4209e4f1382c02f0e8873f2069ae4.png) **

Greenify Faithful 64x is a texture pack that turns everything dyed green in the Faithful 64x pack from an ugly shade to a good looking shade. (check gallery to see!) Utilizing mods like Polytone and Continuity to make sure EVERYTHING dyed green is changed, not just whats possible in normal vanilla texture packs.** **

PLEASE know that I DID NOT MAKE FAITHFUL, OR ANY OF ITS TEXTURES! All credit for the original textures go to the talented people over at [Home - Faithful](https://faithfulpack.net/), please show them so much love and join [their Discord!!!](https://discord.gg/sN9YRQbBv7)** ###

RECCOMMENDED MODS: **

[Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone): Allows entities like sheep, banners, beacons, etc change color.** **

[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity): Allows blocks to have connected textures (glass).** ###

KEEP IN MIND YOU DO NOT NEED THESE MODS! Only if you want to have in the pack what they let me do. ![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ec6470c7626e78674b305a76346ea51cc33d956.png) _

if you'd like to use assets from this pack, let me know about it and please credit the pack and faithful by following their liscence agreements found [here](https://faithfulpack.net/license), somewhere somewhat obvious. like a description or credits area._ _

Just incase of any misunderstandings, please know that this pack is NOT an official Faithful texture pack, this is simple a pack made by me (charlie) that uses their textures as an unofficial addon to tweak everything dyed green._ **

Recoloring made by TeamChar1ie (me)** **

Original Pack made by the amazing people over at [faithfulpack.net](https://faithfulpack.net/)** **

Check out my other projects [Here!](https://modrinth.com/user/TChar1ie)**
